name: dod-guard-monorepo
description: MCP server plugins: dod-guard (anti-cheat DoD verification) and obsidian-rag (RAG/memory on Obsidian vaults)

plugins.name: dod-guard
plugins.description: Lock DoD proofs in MCP storage with anti-cheat verification. Ships /interview, /quality-upgrade, /test-verification, and /test-fixer skills.

plugins.name: obsidian-rag
plugins.description: RAG/memory MCP server on an Obsidian vault. Semantic search, note CRUD, memory recall, backlink traversal — all local, all offline.
